headlines.title: Broadcom rises on AI deals; BofA says visibility improves with Google pact
An All-Time High Plus Great Revenue and Earnings Has This Tech Stock Towering Above the Rest
Microsoft In Downtrend Amid War Woes; Is Microsoft A Buy Or Sell Now?
As Broadcom Expands AI Deals With Google and Anthropic, Should You Buy AVGO Stock?
Invitation Homes' Q1 2026 Earnings: What to Expect
The Big Risk With Taiwan Semiconductor Stock That No One Wants to Talk About
As Bulls and Bears Battle Over AI, $350 Is the Key Number to Watch for Microsoft Stock
Jefferies Raises ADM Price Target to $77, Sees Q1 as Earnings Low Point
Factbox-Goldman Sachs lowers second-quarter 2026 oil price forecasts on US-Iran ceasefire
China industrial profits surge 15% to start year, but oil price shock threatens outlook
headlines.desc: Soaring energy prices are expected to impact China's economy less than most other countries, due to its massive oil reserves and alternative energy sources.

headlines.title: Offbeat Wall Street research firm says it sent an analyst to Strait of Hormuz. Here's what they learned
headlines.desc: Before the U.S and Israel began their war against Iran, about 20% of the world's oil was shipped through the narrow Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: Trump signals possible delay to Beijing summit as U.S. pressures China to help reopen Strait of Hormuz
headlines.desc: The remarks came as Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent met his Chinese counterpart He Lifeng in Paris, paving the way for the summit scheduled for late March.

headlines.title: Bessent says Treasury is not intervening in oil commodities markets and has no authority to do so
headlines.desc: Bessent addressed rumors that the Treasury Department or some other arm of government might step in to try to lower oil prices.

headlines.title: New fees, fewer flights: Higher fuel prices pinch consumer budgets beyond the gas pump
headlines.desc: As corporate policies change, Americans will feel higher oil prices in their wallets beyond the gas pump.

headlines.title: China suppliers warn of higher prices for Americans due to Strait of Hormuz closure
headlines.desc: The Iran war has stalled shipments of oil and its products through the Strait of Hormuz, raising concerns among Chinese manufacturers about supply chain disruptions.

headlines.title: Elizabeth Warren demands answers on costs, economic impact of 'illegal and reckless war'
headlines.desc: The liberal Democratic firebrand ripped President Donald Trump, whom she said has 'dragged the United States into an illegal and reckless war.'

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts see strong growth potential in these 3 stocks
headlines.desc: Investors should look beyond short-term volatility and consider these growth stocks that analysts see upside for, according to TipRanks.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts are confident about the long-term prospects of these 3 stocks
headlines.desc: Amid elevated tensions in the Middle East, top analysts say investors should hold these 3 names for a strong long-term return.

headlines.title: Wealthy consumers are turning to jewelry as an investment, especially colored gemstones
headlines.desc: Lofty gold prices and market volatility are pushing wealthy consumers toward jewelry, especially rare colored gemstones, as handbags lose appeal.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts like these dividend stocks for solid returns
headlines.desc: These stocks that pay dividends consistently have the ability to generate long-term capital appreciation.

headlines.title: Traders now see little chance of an interest rate cut this year following Fed decision
headlines.desc: All of the positive economic talk out of this week's Federal Reserve meeting had a negative impact on investors

headlines.title: The US refinery now processing Venezuelan oil
headlines.desc: Chevron is now importing 250,000 barrels of crude per day from Venezuela.

headlines.title: Warren Buffett says he sold Apple too soon and would buy more of it, though not in this market
headlines.desc: Apple remains Berkshire Hathaway's largest holding even after the conglomerate trimmed its stake at the end of last year.

headlines.title: Why $4 a gallon gas prices won’t trigger Fed interest rate hikes — and could lead to cuts
headlines.desc: While there's still plenty of uncertainty about where rates are headed, Wall Street commentary shifted back to expectations for cuts.

headlines.title: Crypto asset manager CoinShares to begin trading on Nasdaq through SPAC merger
headlines.desc: CoinShares is merging with Vine Hill Capital to form the holding company CoinShares PLC in a deal valuing the business at about $1.2 billion.

headlines.title: Franklin Templeton acquires digital assets investment firm in active crypto management push
headlines.desc: Franklin Templeton has agreed to buy 250 Digital, which will join the newly established unit Franklin Crypto, as the firm deepens its digital assets push.

headlines.title: A fragile U.S.-Iran ceasefire sparks market relief — but no clear path to lasting peace
headlines.desc: The fragile ceasefire agreement is likely to face significant challenges, analysts told CNBC, citing a significant trust deficit on both sides.

headlines.title: Iran Strait of Hormuz warning adds to shipping uncertainty
headlines.desc: Only a few vessels have crossed the strait since the US-Iran ceasefire deal, according to BBC Verify analysis.

headlines.title: Bonds may be the real winner now that the world economy has sidestepped a historic oil crisis
headlines.desc: The Iran crisis threatened “the largest geopolitical oil supply disruption in history,” the Dallas Fed warned.

headlines.title: Intel’s stock soars to a five-year high. This is what’s driving its massive momentum.
headlines.desc: Intel was the second-best performer in the S&P 500 on Wednesday.
